title: Bigger Holes: Rebuild Society
description: Dig big holes, build big civilisations, explore big structures. It's about time those holes get a whole lot bigger.
body:
In 2022 we tried to dig the biggest hole in survival.

Now, with over 270 mods as of v3.2- the holes are about to get a whole lot bigger.

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02a8d4865cc5fccd86fb7a1ed5f86dbdf52aaf98.png)

Features of Bigger Holes: Rebuild Society:

• Dig a hole.

• Dig an even bigger hole.

• Rebuild Society.

• Dig some more holes.

• Explore beautiful biomes and structures from YUNG's mods and even more.

• Make marvelous contraptions with a whole range of Create mods.

• Dig a few more holes.

• Fight or befriend some mythical creatures.

• Dig another hole- for old times' sake.

• Cook a delicious meal with a collection of Farmer's Delight mods.

• Brew some tasty tea, or ferment some cheeky wine.

• Dig a pit.

• Dig one last hole.

This modpack is perfect for those wanting some new experiences but don't want the mods to stray too far away from that well-known and well-loved Minecraft experience.

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02a8d4865cc5fccd86fb7a1ed5f86dbdf52aaf98.png) | Minimum System Requirements | Recommended System Requirements | |---------------------|:---------------------:| | **[Singleplayer]** Memory: 4 GB RAM | **[Singleplayer]** Memory: 8 GB RAM | | **[Multiplayer]** Memory: 2 GB RAM | **[Multiplayer]** Memory: 8 to 10 GB RAM | _Expect the game to take a few minutes to launch, even with adjusted RAM. Modded Minecraft isn't perfect even when optimised to its full potential. If you experience any difficulties, please report them to our Discord so we can amend them as soon as possible._ ![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02a8d4865cc5fccd86fb7a1ed5f86dbdf52aaf98.png)
**

For more information, support, to report bugs or to inquire about the SMP you can join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/bWmnC6jK5C) server.

**
